/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nexus-latest" parent="1" value="<b>BundleManifest</b><br/><font style="font-size:15px;font-weight:400;">artifact_path + sha256 + release data</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="290" x="565" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache-lock" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#c9c3ee;strokeWidth=1.2;arcSize=16;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#3d396f;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10;" </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache-download" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffdfd;strokeColor=#d5b2bd;strokeWidth=1.2;arcSize=16;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#723f49;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10;" value="<b>Download bundle</b><br/><font style="font-size:15px;font-weight:400;">ZIP + .sha256 into .tmp</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="330" x="1015" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache-verify" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffffd;strokeColor=#c8c4b6;strokeWidth=1.2;arcSize=16;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#5e5a50;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10;" value="<b>Verify checksums</b><br/><font style="font-size:15px;font-weight:400;">sidecar hash, then archive SHA256</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="330" x="1015" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache-extract" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffdfc;strokeColor=#dfb7ae;strokeWidth=1.2;arcSize=16;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#74463d;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10;" value="<b>Safe extract</b><br/><font style="font-size:15px;font-weight:400;">single top-level directory, no unsafe paths</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="94" width="330" x="1015" y="615" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache-install" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fbfffd;strokeColor=#9ec9bd;strokeWidth=1.2;arcSize=16;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#22574f;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10;" value="<b>Install cache</b><br/><font style="font-size:15px;font-weight:400;">&lt;cache&gt;/&lt;bundle&gt;/&lt;version&gt;</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="104" width="330" x="1015" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="serving-cached" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d2cef0;strokeWidth=1.15;arcSize=16;fontSize=19;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#55517f;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10;" value="<b>Cache hit</b><br/><font style="font-size:15px;font-weight:400;">valid metadata returns immediately</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="260" x="1525" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="serving-return" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#c9c3ee;strokeWidth=1.2;arcSize=16;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#3d396f;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10;" value="<b>Return package_root</b><br/><font style="font-size:15px;font-weight:400;">Airflow imports DAGs here</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="104" width="260" x="1525" y="308" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="serving-pointer" parent="1" </mxCell> <mxCell id="serving-prune" parent="1" <mxCell id="serving-fallback" parent="1"
